summary: Customer Experience Warm White UI Redesign - All features verified. The customer-facing UI (CustomerHome.js, CustomerCaseDetail.js, BottomTabBar.js) successfully redesigned from dark theme to 'Warm White / Premium Hotel App' aesthetic. All navigation flows, visual elements, and interactions working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: WARM WHITE THEME VERIFIED: CustomerHome background is rgb(244, 241, 236) (#F4F1EC) - warm white canvas as per design guidelines
DARK HERO CARD VERIFIED: Active case hero card has rgb(11, 11, 13) (#0B0B0D) background - premium dark accent on warm canvas
TYPOGRAPHY VERIFIED: Greeting uses 'Cormorant Garamond', serif font for headings
GLASSMORPHISM VERIFIED: BottomTabBar has backdrop-filter: blur(24px) with rgba(244, 241, 236, 0.88) background
GOLD ACCENTS VERIFIED: #D4B36A used for progress bars, active states, and highlights
AUTH FLOW VERIFIED: Customer login via /auth with 'Sign in with password instead' redirects to /home
BOTTOM TAB BAR VERIFIED: Shows 5 tabs (Home/Explore/My Case/Messages/Profile) for authenticated users only
NAVIGATION VERIFIED: All tab navigations work correctly including Messages tab with ?tab=messages query param
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Experience Warm White UI Redesign complete. All visual and functional tests passed. The UI now uses warm white (#F4F1EC) canvas with dark (#0B0B0D) hero card, gold (#D4B36A) accents, Cormorant Garamond headings, DM Sans body, and glassmorphic bottom nav. All customer flows (login, home, case detail, messages, explore, profile) working correctly.

features_verified.Customer_login_via_password: PASS - Click 'Sign in with password instead', enter credentials, redirects to /home
features_verified.CustomerHome_greeting: PASS - Shows 'Welcome back, {firstName}' with Cormorant Garamond font
features_verified.Active_case_hero_dark_card: PASS - Dark background rgb(11, 11, 13) (#0B0B0D) with event type, city, guests, stage progress, RM info
features_verified.Action_pills: PASS - Messages, Payments, Shared pills present and clickable
features_verified.Explore_venues_banner: PASS - Dark banner with 'Explore venues' CTA
features_verified.Other_bookings_list: PASS - Shows other cases below main hero
features_verified.BottomTabBar_authenticated: PASS - Shows 5 tabs for authenticated users
features_verified.BottomTabBar_unauthenticated: PASS - NOT shown on landing page for unauthenticated users
features_verified.CustomerCaseDetail_header: PASS - Back button, 'My Case' overline, event title
features_verified.CustomerCaseDetail_stage_progress: PASS - Stage progress bar with gold segments
features_verified.CustomerCaseDetail_section_tabs: PASS - Overview, Messages, Shared, Payments, Timeline tabs
features_verified.CustomerCaseDetail_overview: PASS - RM card, action rows, 'Need something' section
features_verified.CustomerCaseDetail_messages: PASS - Chat interface, can send messages, messages appear in chat
features_verified.Hero_card_clickable: PASS - Clicking hero card navigates to case detail

mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay is in TEST MODE - payments use /simulate endpoint

design_validation.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl with 88% opacity warm white - VERIFIED
